description: Sprawlmap — Franklin County public land and resource finder. Point any LLM at these tools to answer natural language questions about safe public land and nearby resources for people experiencing homelessness in Columbus, OH.

function.name: findPublicParcels
function.description: Find public/city-owned parcels near a location. Returns parcels owned by City of Columbus, Franklin County Land Bank, Metro Parks, Board of Education, or other public entities with risk assessment.

function.name: findNearbyResources
function.description: Find nearby amenities via OpenStreetMap: bus stops, laundromats, drinking water, power/charging, food banks, mental health, restrooms, shelters, dog parks, wifi.

function.name: scoreLocation
function.description: Score a location 0-100 for suitability based on user needs. Cross-references public land availability with proximity to required resources.

function.name: getParcelDetail
function.description: Get full detail on a specific parcel by PIN from Franklin County Auditor.

function.name: geocode
function.description: Convert address or place name to lat/lon coordinates.

implementation.findPublicParcels: see api.js — FC ArcGIS FeatureServer, USECD 600-699 = exempt/public
implementation.scoreLocation: see api.js — composite score, 40pts public land + 60pts needs met
